title: Pack command and package metadata
body:
Adds the **`beskid pack`** CLI command and initial package metadata model so projects can produce installable package artifacts.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `compiler`
- **Commit:** [`a0b7dbb`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/compiler/commit/a0b7dbb)
- **Subject:** Pack command
- **Completed:** 2026-03-18

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.1 (Compiler foundation)
- **Workstream:** `corelib-packaging`
- **Deliverable:** `v01-compiler-parity`

## Relation
Pairs with **pack-api-metadata** and pckg manifest UI tasks in **corelib-packaging**.
